title: brickellia glandulosa
intro: Brickellia glandulosa, also known as Desert Brickellia or False Yerba, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, characterized by its clusters of small, white flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Brickellia glandulosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain and anxiety, and supporting respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
